Hi Rahul,

Congratulations — we'd like to move forward with your application. Your track record speaks for itself: shipping studybuddy.live to 4,200 WAU and $35k/month revenue as a student, then earning a Product Hunt #3 placement, shows real product instinct. Add the 14 production PRs you merged at Atlan and you've got the builder fundamentals we're looking for.

One quick note: we noticed your resume header email differs from your application email. Could you clarify which is current? Also, if you have a working GitHub link or a couple of representative code samples you can share, that would help us round out the picture.

Looking forward to talking soon.

— Hiring Team
